fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Loaner No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the loaner.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service document specifying the service item you have replaced with the loaner.

fields.name: Service Item Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item line for which you have lent the loaner.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item that you have replaced with the loaner.

fields.name: Service Item Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service item group code of the service item that you have replaced with the loaner.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer to whom you have lent the loaner.

fields.name: Date Lent
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you lent the loaner.

fields.name: Time Lent
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when you lent the loaner.

fields.name: Date Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you received the loaner.

fields.name: Time Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when you received the loaner.

fields.name: Lent
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the loaner is lent.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the document type of the entry is a quote or order.
